title: Escalate
description: Gain an initial foothold as a low-privilege user and escalate to root by chaining common Linux misconfigurations.
longDescription:
A realistic Debian-based machine where you start with SSH credentials for a low-privilege user. Multiple privilege escalation vectors are planted, including SUID binaries, weak sudo rules, cron job abuse, and world-writable scripts.

You are expected to enumerate the system, identify exploitable paths, and escalate to root without using Metasploit.

### What you will practice
Manual enumeration techniques (sudo -l, SUID find, cron inspection), PATH hijacking, and writing simple exploit scripts.
creator: Dock & Root Labs
objectives: Connect to the target via SSH with provided credentials
Enumerate sudo rules, SUID binaries, and cron jobs
Identify at least one exploitable privilege escalation vector
Gain a root shell and read /root/flag.txt
